productDisplayName: Nike Women Solarsoft Thong Red Flip Flops
description: With summer on the rise, ditch your shoes and slip into these super comfy thong flip flops in rouge red colour. These nike women's Celso Solarsoft thong flip flops deliver comfort by combining super-soft cushioning with dynamic Fit through the upper, making them suitable for of outdoor activities.UpperBuilt-in grooves for absolute all-day comfort and massaged feelNeoprene-like straps with a toe separator, feature seamless, cement-free construction for environmentally preferred comfort and a dynamic fit.MidsoleThe midsole features a dual-durometer midsole/outsole with a plush, nike Solarsoft foam midsole and built-in grooves to provide airflow and drainageOutsoleFirm foam outsole with flex grooves for natural range of motion and a cushioned rideEnhanced thickness adds comfortWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Flip flop careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
